Description: Integer representing the count of users following this specific profile.
Integer serving as the unique primary key identifier for each user profile.
Variable character string storing the display name of the user.
Integer representing the user ID of the follower, serving as part of the composite primary key and a foreign key referencing user_profiles.uid.

Integer likely used for data partitioning or sharding purposes within the database.

Datetime value indicating the date and time when the tweet was published.
